reference: GURR TURNED AWAY IMPATIENTLY AGAIN AND SIGNING TO HIS MEN TO FOLLOW THEY ALL BEGAN TO TRAMP UP THE STEEP TRACK LEADING TOWARD THE HOZE WITH THE RABBITS SCUTTLING AWAY AMONG THE FURZE AND SHOWING THEIR WHITE COTTONY TAILS FOR A MOMENT AS THEY DARTED DOWN INTO THEIR HOLES
text: Gero turned away impatiently again, and summoning to his men to follow. They all began to tramp up the steep track leading toward the hose, with the rabbits scuttling away among the furs and showing their white cottony tails for a moment as they darted down into their holes.
